# Public branding assets

This directory contains the deployable branding copies used by the docs site.

Files here are generated from `docs/logo/` by
`scripts/branding/generate_docs_branding.py`:

- `logo.svg`
- `logo.png`
- `icon.svg`
- `icon.png`
- `og-card.png`

Do not edit these files by hand. Regenerate them from the source package
instead.
